notes: Surface reports are generated views. Canonical source-of-truth remains axis-based.
Compute view is based on the core command surface plus compute-relevant capability inventory domains.

commands.notes: Buffer upload with configurable usage flags and submit cadence.
Copy commands including buffer-to-texture, buffer-to-buffer, texture-to-buffer, and texture-to-texture directions.
Kernel dispatch with shader lookup, repeat, warmup, and optional GPU timestamps.
QueueWriteTexture with full texture resource descriptor.
Texture property query with optional expected-value assertions.
Async buffer map for read/write with callback completion.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/main.zig --queue-sync-mode, runtime/zig/src/webgpu_ffi.zig QueueSyncMode
entries.notes: per-command and deferred queue sync modes are available; trace-meta records queueSyncMode.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/wgpu_async_procs.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_render_commands.zig async pipeline path
entries.notes: render pipeline creation now uses DeviceCreateRenderPipelineAsync with explicit wait, push/pop error scopes, and shader compilation-info retrieval before pipeline cache insert.

entries.contract: executionGpuTimestampTotalNs + executionGpuTimestampAttemptedCount + executionGpuTimestampValidCount trace-meta fields
entries.notes: timestamp reliability is now explicit in execution artifacts via attempted/valid counters; readback path fails invalid timestamp ranges instead of silently normalizing.

entries.contract: TextureQueryCommand expected_* fields + native texture query validation
entries.notes: texture_query can now assert expected width/height/depth/format/dimension/view-dimension/sample-count/usage with fail-fast mismatch reporting.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/wgpu_p1_capability_procs.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_capability_runtime.zig + runtime/zig/src/webgpu_ffi.zig
entries.notes: instance/adapter/device capability introspection APIs are dynamically loaded and exercised with explicit status checks, including feature/limits/info/proc-address paths and related free-members contracts.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/wgpu_p1_resource_table_procs.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_async_diagnostics_command.zig
entries.notes: ResourceTable create/update/remove/destroy/release and pass/bundle/compute set-resource-table + set-immediates APIs are implemented behind explicit feature gating; unsupported adapters return deterministic unsupported status.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/wgpu_p2_lifecycle_procs.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_async_diagnostics_command.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_capability_runtime.zig
entries.notes: all requested AddRef entry points are loaded and wired; lifecycle diagnostics execute balanced addref/release touch paths for available object classes and skip unsupported object families deterministically.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/wgpu_p0_procs.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_resources.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_commands.zig barrier lowering
entries.notes: buffer replacement and teardown now call wgpuBufferDestroy before release; barrier commands lower through wgpuCommandEncoderClearBuffer with deterministic scratch-buffer sizing.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/wgpu_p0_procs.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_resources.zig + runtime/zig/src/wgpu_commands.zig
entries.notes: compute pipelines use wgpuDeviceCreateComputePipelineAsync when available; dispatch path stages indirect args with wgpuCommandEncoderWriteBuffer, dispatches with wgpuComputePassEncoderDispatchWorkgroupsIndirect, and uses pass timestamps with wgpuComputePassEncoderWriteTimestamp when pass timestamps are available.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/wgpu_p0_procs.zig querySetMatches + destroyQuerySet; compute/render query setup paths
entries.notes: query sets now validate count/type via wgpuQuerySetGetCount/wgpuQuerySetGetType and call wgpuQuerySetDestroy before release in compute and render P0 helper paths.

entries.contract: runtime/zig/src/webgpu_ffi.zig deinit
entries.notes: device teardown now explicitly calls wgpuDeviceDestroy before wgpuDeviceRelease.
